title: Getting Started
content:
phosphor is a pure C CLI tool for the NeonSignal/Cathode ecosystem. It scaffolds projects from TOML template manifests, builds, cleans, and runs diagnostics.

Installation

git clone https://github.com/relicloops/phosphor.git
cd phosphor
meson setup build
ninja -C build
./build/phosphor version

Dependencies

  • C standard: C17 (gnu17 for tests)
  • Build system: Meson 1.0+ with Ninja backend
  • Compiler: GCC 10+ or Clang 14+
  • POSIX: POSIX.1-2008 APIs
  • Test framework: Ceedling 1.0.1 (Unity + CMock + CException)

Optional Dependencies

  • libgit2 v1.9.2 -- remote git template cloning
  • libarchive v3.8.5 -- archive template extraction (tar.gz, tar.zst, zip)
  • PCRE2 v10.45 -- regex filters in template manifests

title: CLI Grammar
content:
This is the frozen reference grammar (v1) for the phosphor CLI argument parser. The grammar uses ISO 14977 EBNF notation.

Top-Level Structure

command_line   = "phosphor" command { arg } ;

command        = "create"
               | "build"
               | "clean"
               | "doctor"
               | "version"
               | "help" ;

arg            = long_flag ;

Flag Categories

long_flag      = valued_flag
               | bool_switch
               | bool_action ;

valued_flag    = "--" flag_ident "=" typed_value ;
bool_action    = "--" flag_ident ;
bool_switch    = "--enable-" flag_ident
               | "--disable-" flag_ident ;

Typed Values & KVP

typed_value    = kvp | scalar ;
scalar         = quoted_string | bool_lit | number_lit | bare_token ;

kvp            = "!" kvp_pairs ;
kvp_pairs      = kvp_pair { "|" kvp_pair } ;
kvp_pair       = kvp_key ":" kvp_value ;

Disambiguation Rules

  • DR-01: bool_switch before bool_action -- attempt --enable- / --disable- prefixes before falling back to bool_action.
  • DR-02: scalar alternative ordering -- quoted_string, then bool_lit, then number_lit, then bare_token.
  • DR-03: bare_token exclusion set -- excludes ", =, |, {, }, !.
  • DR-04: typed_value kvp lookahead -- single-character lookahead on ! to distinguish kvp from scalar.
  • DR-05: condition ! vs kvp ! -- the two grammars are never active simultaneously.

title: Exit Codes
content:
Exit codes are stable across all phosphor commands. Every error condition maps to exactly one exit code.

CodeCategoryDescription
0successCommand completed without error.
1general errorUnmapped error, including child process exit codes with no specific mapping.
2invalid args / usageCLI argument parsing or semantic validation failed. All ux* subcodes produce this exit code.
3config / template parse errorTOML manifest or config file is syntactically or structurally invalid.
4filesystem errorFile or directory operation failed (read, write, copy, rename, delete).
5process execution failureChild process could not be spawned, or spawned but exited with a mapped failure.
6validation / guardrail failureSemantic validation of manifest, paths, or runtime constraints failed.
7internal invariant violationA condition that should never occur in correct code was detected (phosphor bug).
8interrupted by signalSIGINT or SIGTERM received. Cleanup was attempted before exit.

Parser Diagnostic Subcodes

SubcodeCategoryDescription
ux001unknown flagThe flag is not registered in the command's argspec table.
ux002missing assignment / valueA valued flag was used without =value, or a boolean flag was given =value.
ux003duplicate flagThe same flag appears more than once.
ux004enable/disable conflictBoth --enable-X and --disable-X appear for the same feature.
ux005typed value mismatchThe token does not match the declared type for the flag.
ux006malformed kvp payloadThe !-prefixed kvp value has structural errors.
ux007enum choice violationThe value is not in the declared choices list.

title: Template Manifest Schema
content:
Schema version 1. All template directories must contain a template.phosphor.toml file at the root.

[manifest] -- metadata

KeyTypeRequiredDescription
schemaintegeryesSchema version (must be 1).
idstringyesTemplate slug identifier.
versionstringyesSemver version of the template.

[template] -- template metadata

KeyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringnoHuman-readable template name.
source_rootstringyesRelative path to template source directory.
descriptionstringnoOne-line description.
min_phosphorstringnoMinimum phosphor version required (semver).
licensestringnoLicense identifier (SPDX).

[[variables]] -- variable definitions

KeyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringyesVariable name (referenced as <<name>> in templates).
typestringnoOne of: string, bool, int, enum, path, url. Default: string.
requiredbooleannoIf true, must be resolved at merge time. Default: false.
defaultstringnoDefault value (lowest precedence in merge chain).
envstringnoEnvironment variable name to read (precedence level 2).
patternstringnoRegex the resolved value must match.
choicesarraynoValid values (type enum only).
secretbooleannoIf true, value is masked in logs. Default: false.

[[ops]] -- operations

At least one entry is required. Each operation specifies a kind: mkdir, copy, render, chmod, or remove. Operations support conditional execution, atomic writes, and newline normalization.

[[hooks]] -- lifecycle hooks

Executed before/after template operations. Supported timings: pre-create and post-create. Each hook defines a run argv array and optional cwd, condition, and allow_failure fields.

Resource Limits

  • PH_MAX_OPS: 1024
  • PH_MAX_VARIABLES: 128
  • PH_MAX_HOOKS: 16
  • PH_MAX_DIR_DEPTH: 32

title: Template Sources
content:
phosphor supports three template source types:

Local Directory

A path to a directory containing template.phosphor.toml at its root.

phosphor create --name=my-app --template=./templates/landing

Remote Git Repository

An https:// URL pointing to a git repository. Requires libgit2 support (compile with -Dlibgit2=true). An optional #ref suffix specifies a branch, tag, or commit.

phosphor create --name=my-app --template=https://github.com/user/template
phosphor create --name=my-app --template=https://github.com/user/template#v1.0

Archive File

A path to an archive file (tar.gz, tar.zst, or zip). Requires libarchive support (compile with -Dlibarchive=true). Supports optional checksum verification via --checksum=sha256:<hex>.

phosphor create --name=my-app --template=./template.tar.gz
phosphor create --name=my-app --template=./template.tar.gz \
    --checksum=sha256:a948...2b28
